    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics schemaStructWithTag:warning
    import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"
    
    export const preview = Schema.Struct({
      _tag: Schema.Literal("User"),
      name: Schema.String
    })
